com.mentor.chs.api.report

Interface IXReportCreator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXEmbeddableReport, IXFunctionDesignReport, IXHarnessReport, IXHarnessTVMReport, IXIntegratorReport, IXLogicReport, IXPlatformReport, IXSBOMReport, IXTopologyReport

    public interface IXReportCreator
extends IXPlugin
    This interface needs to be implemented for generating the custom report. The implementation of this interface should create the report given the context.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXReport createReport(IXReportContext context)
      create an empty report using context

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • createReport

        IXReport createReport(IXReportContext context)
        create an empty report using context
        Parameters:
        context - provides access to factory method to create report modules
        Returns:
        report (not null if successully created)
